rationale: MethodAccessException in GridFS filtering after upgrade; internal .NET method accessibility regression, not a spec rule violation.
LINQ 'Unsupported filter' regression after 2.3→2.4 upgrade; C#-specific query translator bug, no spec rule contradicted.
GridFS spec requires checking index existence before creating them; driver always calls createIndex unconditionally, failing for restricted users.
API design improvement for empty $and/$or clauses; no spec rule defines how empty clause lists should render.
Flaky test race condition in ReceiveMessage_should_handle_out_of_order_replies; test infrastructure bug, not driver behavior.
Flaky test due to test ordering assumption about database existence; test infrastructure issue, not driver behavior.
Broken documentation hyperlinks (src vs tests path); documentation-only bug, no spec or driver behavior involved.
LINQ query optimization to merge multiple $match stages; performance improvement, no spec rule contradicted.
EnumRepresentationConvention not applied to Dictionary<Enum,T> keys; C#-specific serialization convention bug, not in BSON spec.
Struct types cannot be serialized/deserialized; C#-specific value-type serialization limitation, no spec rule involved.
RegisterClassMap silently accepts unfrozen map then fails later; internal API usage/validation bug, no spec involved.
Unused variable in BsonClassMapSerializer; code quality improvement, no spec rule involved.
Misordered arguments to ArgumentException constructor; internal code quality bug, no spec behavior involved.
Distinct() regression in 2.4.1 when TField doesn't exactly match array element type; C#-specific type coercion API regression.
In() regression in 2.4.1 when TField doesn't match array element type; C#-specific type-coercion API compatibility regression.
Eq() regression in 2.4.1 with enum list and BsonRepresentation; C#-specific serialization compatibility regression.
LINQ ExpressionNormalizer fails comparing bool to Nullable<bool>; C#-specific expression tree translation bug, no spec rule.
MongoClientSettings.Server setter doesn't work when passing URI string; C#-specific API bug, no spec rule violated.
Aggregate projection fails to map '_id' field to C# 'Id' property; C#-specific serialization/projection mapping bug.
Missing feature: LINQ sorting on subdocuments via array index; feature request, no spec rule violated.
InvalidCastException in CastingSerializer when implicit operator conversions are used; C#-specific serializer regression.
And(empty, empty) regresses to render illegal {$and:[]} instead of empty; C#-specific filter builder API regression.
Nullable enum in Where() ignores BsonRepresentation and renders integer instead of string; C#-specific serializer rendering bug.
Lambda expressions resolving enum field names fail in builder API; C#-specific expression/reflection bug, no spec rule.
NullReferenceException with nullable enum parameter in LINQ filter; duplicate of CSHARP-1919, C#-specific serializer regression.
NullReferenceException with nullable enum parameter in LINQ filter; duplicate of CSHARP-1919, C#-specific serializer regression.
Nullable type .Value accessor drops parent path segment in LINQ query translation; C#-specific expression tree bug.
Improvement to stop sending WriteConcern with reIndex; alignment with server change, issuetype Improvement, no prior spec rule violated.
Nullable List Contains in expression filter throws cast exception; C#-specific serialization regression in 2.3, no spec rule.
Nullable array in Expression filter throws cast exception after upgrade; C#-specific serializer regression, duplicate of CSHARP-1777.
Nullable sbyte? field loses parent path in LINQ query; C#-specific nullable type handling bug in query translator.
SslSettings.CloneCertificate drops X509Certificate2 private key since 2.3.0, breaking X.509 mutual-TLS auth entirely.
NullReferenceException in predicate translator on ReplaceOneAsync after 2.4.2; C#-specific serializer regression.
Intermittent connectivity failure to Atlas; remote certificate invalid error, environment/network issue, no spec rule.
DllNotFoundException for ntdll.dll on Mono/macOS; platform compatibility bug in OS detection code, no spec rule.
UpdateDefinitionBuilder adds _t/_v discriminator when setting IEnumerable via object reference; C#-specific serialization bug.
Sequence contains no elements in GridFS chunk cursor batch; internal implementation bug reading 2GB file, no spec rule violated.
Invalid BinaryConnection state transition from 2 to Failed during failover; internal state machine bug, no spec rule.
Request to add CSHARP-1975 fix to release notes; documentation-only change, no driver behavior involved.
GridFSSeekableDownloadStream uses subtraction instead of addition for SeekOrigin.End; C#-specific stream seek arithmetic bug.
TryParseHexString swallows all exceptions including OutOfMemoryException; internal code quality issue, no spec rule.
GuidRepresentation setting incorrectly rejects UUID subtype 4 from server; C#-specific driver config enforcement bug.
Decimal128.ToDecimal throws OverflowException when precision loss would allow success; C#-specific conversion behavior, not spec-defined.
Intermittent EndOfStreamException when receiving messages on Atlas; thin description, connectivity issue, no spec rule named.
LINQ Include() projection fails on nested array Select() expression; C#-specific expression serialization limitation, not spec.
Feature request to support index management on GridFS collections; improvement, not a spec rule violation.
FindAndModify fails when Update contains array of complex objects due to BSON mapping; C#-specific serialization bug.
BulkWrite hangs indefinitely when called with empty list; implementation behavior issue, no spec rule defines empty BulkWrite semantics.
Feature request to add GridFS.DeleteByNameAsync(); missing API convenience method, not a spec nonconformance.
EndOfStreamException during GridFS upload; thin description, connectivity/network issue, no spec rule contradicted.
